user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate 3-phase PWM motor control to new AURIX target
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase inverter PWM on GTM TOM1 with TOM1.CH0 as the time base at 20 kHz, center-aligned, complementary outputs with 0.5 us deadtime and 1.0 us min pulse. Initialize duties to U=25%, V=50%, W=75%, then every 500 ms step each by +10% with wrap in 0–100%. Use synchronous batch updates via IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_disableUpdate / IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_applyUpdate.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl with IfxGtm_Tom_Timer as the TOM1 time-base. Map pins on Port 02 using IfxGtm_PinMap.h (TC38x LFBGA292): U_HS=IfxGtm_TOM1_0_TOUT104_P02_0_OUT, U_LS=IfxGtm_TOM1_1_TOUT111_P02_7_OUT; V_HS=IfxGtm_TOM1_2_TOUT105_P02_1_OUT, V_LS=IfxGtm_TOM1_3_TOUT108_P02_4_OUT; W_HS=IfxGtm_TOM1_4_TOUT106_P02_2_OUT, W_LS=IfxGtm_TOM1_5_TOUT109_P02_5_OUT. Initialize via *_initConfig → set fields → *_init. Set mode to center-aligned, set deadtime=0.5 us, minPulse=1.0 us. For each 500 ms update: IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_disableUpdate → IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl_setOnTime for U/V/W → IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_applyUpdate.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Mandatory header selection requires IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl. It directly targets TOM1 complementary high/low PWM with software deadtime and center-aligned operation, matching the project's legacy structure and requirements. It pairs naturally with IfxGtm_Tom_Timer for synchronous updates.
reviewer_corrections: Consult the iLLD documentation or Infineon MCAL user manual for explicit driver-to-use guidance for 3-phase PWM with deadtime.
Check the iLLD package for TC3xx/TC38x (e.g., 0_Src/BaseSw/iLLD/TC3xx/Tricore/Gtm/Tom/PwmHl/IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl.h) to confirm header and API presence.

runtime_function.name: GTM_TOM_3_Phase_Inverter_PWM_updateDuties
runtime_function.purpose: Every 500 ms, step U/V/W duties by +10% with wrap over 0–100% and apply synchronously while running 20 kHz center-aligned PWM on TOM1 with complementary outputs.
reviewer_corrections: Check the iLLD API reference for TC3xx to confirm if IfxGtm_Tom_Dtm_PwmHl_setOnTimeAndShift exists and is appropriate for use.
Refer to the iLLD API documentation for IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl and IfxGtm_Tom_Timer to confirm correct usage for synchronous updates.
Cross-check the board schematic and LFBGA-292 pinout to ensure TOM1 channels 0-5 and their mapped TOUT pins are not used by other peripherals.

driver_changes: Stay on IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl for TOM1 complementary PWM.
Add explicit synchronous buffer control using IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_disableUpdate / IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_applyUpdate around duty writes.
api_changes: Introduce IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_disableUpdate / IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_applyUpdate for synchronous updates
migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution keeps TOM1 as the PWM generator with CH0 as time base, enforces 20 kHz center-aligned operation, uses complementary pairs with 0.5 us deadtime and 1.0 us min pulse, maps the exact P02 pins using IfxGtm_PinMap macros for TC38x LFBGA292, initializes U/V/W to 25/50/75%, and updates duties synchronously every 500 ms with +10% step and wrap per the original requirement.

PWM.rationale: … Available in template | … Matches target family (TC3xx) | Complexity: advanced | Best for: 3-phase inverter, motor control, multi-channel synchronized PWM | Features: multi_channel_sync, complementary_pairs, dead_time, center_aligned, edge_aligned
